error_signature: The workflow has issues and cannot be executed for that reason
title: Workflow execution blocked due to node errors
symptom: When attempting to execute previous steps in a workflow, n8n displays an error stating that the workflow has issues and cannot be executed. This prevents any execution of the workflow.
applies_when: Previous steps need to be executed
not_this_if: All nodes in the workflow are error-free
root_cause: n8n requires all nodes in a workflow to be error-free before allowing execution of any part of the workflow. If there are errors in any node, even those not directly involved in the current execution path, the entire workflow is blocked.
fix_steps: Identify and fix all errors in the nodes of the workflow
Disable any nodes that are causing issues if they are not needed
Attempt to execute the previous steps again
agent_instruction: Fix all node errors or disable problematic nodes before executing the workflow.
